nasb.text: for I was hungry, and you gave Me nothing to eat; I was thirsty, and you gave Me nothing to drink;

esv.text: For I was hungry and you gave me no food, I was thirsty and you gave me no drink,

cnv.text: 因為我餓了，你們沒有給我吃；我渴了，你們沒有給我喝；

ccb.text: 因为我饥饿时，你们不给我吃的；我口渴时，你们不给我喝的；

csbs.text: 因为我饿了， 你们没有给我吃； 我渴了， 你们没有给我喝；
